ads.prompt: A confident male health doctor in a clean modern studio looks directly into the camera and says 'This is the #1 reason you're exhausted every single day — and doctors never tell you.' Cut to animated infographic showing the adrenal-cortisol cycle, then back to the doctor pointing at the viewer. Bold white caption text on screen. Viral educational health TikTok ad style. Bright professional lighting, crisp 9:16 vertical framing, engaging and urgent pacing.

Sleek premium health supplement product ad for Dr. Berg's Electrolyte Powder. Close-up of a clean white and green supplement bottle with a glowing health aura. Hand scoops powder into a glass of sparkling water, dissolves instantly. Bold on-screen text: 'No Sugar. No Fillers. Real Results.' Energetic upbeat music, vibrant color grading, TikTok and Instagram Reels ready, 9:16 vertical ad format.

Cinematic health transformation testimonial ad. Open on a tired, sluggish person sitting at a desk in dull lighting — text on screen: 'I was exhausted for 3 years.' Cut to same person 60 days later, glowing, energetic, outdoors in golden-hour sunlight — text: 'Then I found Dr. Berg.' Close-up on a smiling face with vibrant skin. Final frame: Dr. Berg logo and website URL on clean white background. Warm cinematic color grade, emotional orchestral score, 9:16 vertical format.
